ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency or organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., State Agency, Tribal Organization) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was established */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the agency operates */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the agency */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency associated with the participation data */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program associated with the participation data */,
  "month_year" TEXT /* Date representing the month and year of the data collection */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants recorded for that month */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of participants */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of participants */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of participants */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code where participants are from */,
  "source_of_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the participation */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the target population that participated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_data_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_data_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_participation" (
  "avg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the average record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency for which the average is calculated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the average is calculated */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Month for which the average is calculated */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program for which the average is calculated */,
  "average_participants" REAL /* Average number of participants over the collected data period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_participation_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_participation_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded data file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency managing the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target number of participants for the program */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants in the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency being checked */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Result of the compliance check (compliant or non-compliant) */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the compliance check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the feedback is related to */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "is_follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether a follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up was done or is required */,
  "follow_up_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency for which the report is generated */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
